answer:
# DATA USED

| Mục | Dữ liệu dùng |
|---|---|
| Query used | `AI Printables KDP Prompt Agent + market-pattern + product-blueprint + WarriorPlus pack benchmark` |
| Retrieved chunks | 36 chunks trong context hiện tại |
| Brain files loaded | `brain/AI_PRINTABLES_KDP_BRAIN.json`, `brain/AI_PRINTABLES_KDP_BRAIN.md`, `brain/MARKET_PATTERNS.md`, `brain/COMPETITOR_PATTERNS.md`, `brain/OFFER_ANGLES.md`, `skills/01_market_pattern_ai_printables.md` |
| Patterns found | Prompt pack đơn thuần rủi ro cao; gói thắng cần workflow, examples, checklist, fix prompts, listing/sales kit, license clarity. Niche có tín hiệu: coloring books, Canva PLR templates, digital planners, KDP/POD/Etsy tools, checklist vaults, hidden digital download ideas. |
| Confidence level | Medium. Có brain/source map và metadata, nhưng chưa có test buyer thật, payment thật, JV thật, delivery thật. |
| What is inferred | Giá FE $17–$27, bump $7–$17, OTO $37–$97 là heuristic, không phải số liệu nguồn chứng minh. |
| What is not proven | Doanh số, tỷ lệ chuyển đổi, license resale cụ thể, buyer demand thật, WarriorPlus approval, Public Launch Ready. |

# SKILLS USED

`#market-pattern`, `#product-blueprint`, `#deep-file-writer`, `#sales-page`, `#warriorplus-listing`, `#jv-pack`, `#delivery-support`, `#buyer-test`, `#ai-replace-risk`, `#refund-risk`, `#license-check`, `#public-launch-audit`

# PRODUCT NAME

**Printable Prompt-to-Product Sprint**  
Tagline: **A 7-Day AI Printables/KDP Product Kit For Turning Simple Ideas Into Organized Printable Offers**

---

# VERDICT

**NÊN LÀM — nhưng chỉ ở dạng compact benchmark / internal test pack, chưa được gọi là Public Launch Ready.**

Góc mới chọn: không bán “1000 prompts tạo coloring book”. Bán **quy trình 7 ngày biến một ý tưởng printable thành mini product pack có prompts, templates, examples, quality checks, listing copy và compliance notes**.

Buyer chính: beginner KDP/Etsy/PLR/WarriorPlus seller đang bị kẹt ở bước “có AI nhưng không biết đóng gói thành sản phẩm bán được”.

---

# PRODUCT PACK FILES — REAL USABLE CONTENT

## 00_Start_Here.md

```md
# Printable Prompt-to-Product Sprint

## Bạn sẽ tạo gì?
Một mini printable product pack gồm:
1. Niche idea
2. Printable concept
3. Prompt set
4. Template guide
5. Example output
6. Quality checklist
7. Listing/sales copy draft
8. License/compliance note

## Dùng cho ai?
- Người mới bán digital products
- KDP/Etsy/Canva printable creator
- PLR seller cần rebrand có cấu trúc
- WarriorPlus vendor cần FE product gọn

## Không hứa gì?
Không hứa có sale, ranking KDP, Etsy traffic, approval marketplace, hoặc thu nhập.

## Cách dùng nhanh
Day 1: chọn niche  
Day 2: tạo product concept  
Day 3: tạo prompts  
Day 4: tạo sample pages  
Day 5: kiểm tra chất lượng  
Day 6: viết listing/sales copy  
Day 7: đóng gói và review license
```

## 01_Workflow_Map.md

```md
# 7-Day Workflow Map

| Day | Action | Output |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | Chọn niche an toàn, không trademark | Niche Decision Sheet |
| 2 | Chọn printable format | Product Concept Card |
| 3 | Generate prompts | Prompt Library v1 |
| 4 | Tạo 3 sample outputs | Example Pack |
| 5 | QC: size, clarity, originality, safety | Quality Report |
| 6 | Viết listing/sales kit | Listing Copy Draft |
| 7 | Đóng gói + license note | ZIP-ready folder |

## Rule
Không upload/bán asset nếu chưa kiểm tra copyright, trademark, font, Canva/stock/AI image rights.
```

## 02_Prompt_Library.md

```md
# Prompt Library

## Prompt 1 — Niche Finder
Role: You are a printable product strategist.
Input: audience, platform, season, skill level.
Task: Generate 10 printable product niches.
Constraints: avoid trademarks, celebrities, medical/therapy claims, copyrighted characters.
Output: table with niche, buyer, printable type, risk, sample title.

## Prompt 2 — Product Concept Builder
Create a printable product concept for:
Audience: [AUDIENCE]
Platform: [KDP/Etsy/Payhip/WarriorPlus]
Format: [planner/journal/worksheet/coloring/activity]
Output:
- Product name
- Buyer pain
- Safe promise
- 10 page ideas
- Bonus idea
- Risk notes

## Prompt 3 — Page Prompt Generator
Create 20 printable page prompts for [NICHE].
Each prompt must include:
- Page objective
- Layout suggestion
- Text elements
- Visual style
- Avoid list

## Prompt 4 — Listing Copy Draft
Write a marketplace listing for [PRODUCT].
Include:
- Title
- Subtitle
- 5 bullets
- Description
- Who it is for
- Usage disclaimer
No income, ranking, or guaranteed result claims.

## Prompt 5 — Fix Prompt
Review this output: [PASTE OUTPUT]
Find:
- Generic wording
- Trademark risk
- unclear buyer
- weak printable use case
- missing instructions
Rewrite into a cleaner version.
```

## 03_Template_Guide.md

```md
# Template Guide

## Recommended printable pack structure
- Cover page
- How to use page
- 10–30 core printable pages
- Bonus tracker/checklist
- License/disclaimer page

## Canva/Design rules
- Use commercially safe fonts only.
- Avoid Disney, Marvel, celebrities, sports teams, brand names.
- Keep margins print-friendly.
- Export PDF Print for buyers, PNG preview for listing.

## KDP/Etsy adaptation
KDP: interior consistency, trim size, no misleading claims.  
Etsy: preview images, clear buyer instructions, digital download note.  
WarriorPlus: sell the system, not guaranteed marketplace results.
```

## 04_Example_Outputs.md

```md
# Example Output

## Example niche
Busy moms planning screen-free weekend activities for kids.

## Product concept
Title: Screen-Free Weekend Activity Printable Kit  
Buyer: Parent needing quick at-home activities  
Promise: Plan simple weekend activities without creating everything from scratch.  
Format: Printable planner + activity cards

## 10 page ideas
1. Weekend activity planner
2. Indoor activity cards
3. Outdoor activity cards
4. Supplies checklist
5. Screen-free reward tracker
6. Family reflection sheet
7. Rainy day backup list
8. Chore-to-play balance sheet
9. Coloring break page
10. Parent notes page

## Listing bullet sample
- Includes simple printable planning pages for family weekend activities.
- Designed for personal organization and home use.
- No special software required after download.
```

## 05_Quality_Checklist.md

```md
# Quality Checklist

Before selling, verify:

- [ ] Buyer is specific.
- [ ] Promise is operational, not income-based.
- [ ] No trademarked names or copyrighted characters.
- [ ] No medical, therapy, education guarantee.
- [ ] Fonts/images have commercial-use clarity.
- [ ] Prompt outputs were edited, not pasted raw.
- [ ] Sample pages are included.
- [ ] Buyer instructions are clear.
- [ ] License/compliance file is included.
- [ ] ZIP folder opens and files are named clearly.
```

## 06_Fix_Prompts.md

```md
# Fix Prompts

## Generic Output Fix
Rewrite this printable concept so it targets one clear buyer, one painful problem, and one use case:
[PASTE]

## Compliance Fix
Audit this product title and page list for trademark, copyright, medical, therapy, kids safety, and income claim risks:
[PASTE]

## Buyer Value Fix
Add implementation value beyond AI prompts:
- workflow
- examples
- checklist
- usage guide
- listing copy
- support FAQ

## Sales Copy Fix
Remove hype, fake scarcity, and unrealistic claims from this copy:
[PASTE]
```

## 07_Listing_Sales_Kit.md

```md
# Listing Sales Kit

## Marketplace title
Printable Prompt-to-Product Sprint: 7-Day AI Printable Product Kit

## Short description
A practical kit that helps creators turn AI-assisted printable ideas into organized product packs with prompts, examples, checklists, listing copy, and compliance notes.

## Benefit bullets
- Pick a printable niche without guessing blindly.
- Turn prompts into a structured product workflow.
- Use examples and quality checks to avoid raw AI output.
- Prepare listing/sales copy with safer claims.
- Package files clearly for buyers.

## Objection: Can I just ask AI?
Yes, AI can generate prompts. This kit adds sequence, quality checks, fix prompts, examples, packaging, sales copy structure, and compliance reminders.
```

## 08_License_Compliance.md

```md
# License & Compliance

HUMAN REVIEW REQUIRED.

This product pack is original instructional material generated for benchmarking. It does not grant rights to third-party PLR, Canva templates, stock images, fonts, or AI-generated images unless those assets are separately licensed.

Do not claim:
- guaranteed sales
- guaranteed KDP ranking
- guaranteed Etsy traffic
- guaranteed income
- therapy/medical/educational outcomes

Check before commercial use:
- AI tool terms
- Canva/font/stock image license
- PLR/MRR/RR source rights
- trademarked phrases
- marketplace policy
```

---

# SALES + LAUNCH FILES

## sales_page.md

```md
# Printable Prompt-to-Product Sprint

## Headline
Turn AI Printable Ideas Into A Structured Product Pack In 7 Days — Without Selling A Raw Prompt Dump

## Subheadline
A compact implementation kit for beginner printable, KDP, Etsy, PLR, and WarriorPlus creators who need workflow, prompts, examples, quality checks, and listing copy in one organized system.

## Problem
AI can generate ideas fast. But most beginners still get stuck with generic prompts, messy outputs, unclear rights, weak listings, and no product structure.

## Solution
Printable Prompt-to-Product Sprint gives you a 7-day workflow for choosing a safer printable niche, creating page prompts, testing sample outputs, checking quality, and preparing a simple sales/listing kit.

## What’s inside
- Start Here guide
- 7-day workflow map
- Prompt library
- Template guide
- Example output pack
- Quality checklist
- Fix prompts
- Listing/sales kit
- License/compliance note

## Can I just ask AI to make this?
You can ask AI for prompts. But AI will not automatically give you a buyer-ready workflow, packaging structure, compliance review points, examples, fix process, and launch copy. This kit organizes the process so you can implement faster and avoid obvious mistakes.

## Who it is for
- Beginner digital product sellers
- KDP/Etsy printable creators
- PLR sellers who want a cleaner product structure
- WarriorPlus vendors building a small FE offer

## Who it is not for
- Anyone wanting guaranteed sales
- Anyone wanting trademarked character products
- Anyone refusing to check license rights
- Advanced designers wanting complex automation

## Risk reversal
If the files are missing or unusable, contact support within the stated refund period. No income or sales result is guaranteed.

## CTA
Download the kit, follow Day 1 to Day 7, and build your first structured printable product pack.
```

## warriorplus_listing.md

```md
# WarriorPlus Listing

Product Title: Printable Prompt-to-Product Sprint  
Category: Digital Product / AI / Printables / PLR Training  
Price: $17 FE — inference, not source-proven  
Commission: 50% suggested for test launch  
Refund Policy: 14-day practical refund for access/file issues; no income-result guarantee.

Short Description:
A 7-day AI printables implementation kit with prompts, examples, checklists, listing copy, and compliance notes.

Long Description:
Printable Prompt-to-Product Sprint helps beginner creators turn AI-assisted printable ideas into structured product packs. Instead of selling raw prompts, users follow a guided workflow: choose a niche, build a product concept, generate page prompts, review outputs, fix weak sections, write listing copy, and check licensing/compliance risks.

Tags:
AI printables, KDP, Etsy, PLR, prompt pack, Canva, digital products, WarriorPlus

Vendor Note:
Do not claim guaranteed sales, ranking, income, or marketplace approval.

Affiliate Approval Note:
Approve affiliates who agree to compliant promotion and avoid income claims.
```

## jv_pack.md

```md
# JV Pack

## JV Invite
Subject: New AI Printables Kit For Beginners — Clean $17 FE

Hi [NAME],  
I’m preparing a compact AI Printables/KDP implementation kit for beginners. It is not a raw prompt dump. It includes workflow, prompts, examples, QC checklist, fix prompts, sales/listing copy, and license notes.

FE: $17 suggested  
Commission: 50% suggested  
Angle: Helps buyers turn AI printable ideas into organized product packs.

Compliance: No income claims, no fake scarcity, no ranking guarantees.

## Affiliate Swipe 1
Subject: Turn AI printable ideas into a product pack

Most AI printable products fail because they are just prompt dumps. This kit gives you a 7-day workflow, prompts, examples, checklists, and listing copy so you can build something more organized.

## Affiliate Swipe 2
Subject: AI prompts are not enough

This kit helps beginner creators move from “random AI output” to a structured printable product workflow with quality checks and compliance notes.

## Social Post
AI can create printable ideas. But selling raw AI output is weak. Printable Prompt-to-Product Sprint gives you the workflow, prompts, examples, checklist, and listing copy structure to package a cleaner product.
```

## delivery_page.md

```md
# Delivery Page

Thank you for purchasing Printable Prompt-to-Product Sprint.

## Download order
1. Read 00_Start_Here.md
2. Follow 01_Workflow_Map.md
3. Use 02_Prompt_Library.md
4. Review 04_Example_Outputs.md
5. Complete 05_Quality_Checklist.md
6. Read 08_License_Compliance.md before selling anything

## Support
If a file is missing or unclear, contact support with:
- order ID
- file name
- issue description
```

## support_faq.md

```md
# Support FAQ

## Is this PLR?
UNKNOWN unless a separate license explicitly grants PLR/MRR/RR rights. Treat as personal/commercial-use instructional kit only until license is reviewed.

## Can I resell this exact kit?
Not unless resale rights are explicitly granted in your license.

## Can I use it to create my own printable products?
Yes, as a workflow and planning system, subject to checking rights for any images, fonts, Canva elements, AI outputs, or source PLR you use.

## Does it guarantee sales?
No.

## Can I use Canva?
Yes, but check Canva’s current license terms for any assets used.

## Can I use AI images?
Yes only after checking the AI tool’s commercial-use terms and avoiding trademark/copyright issues.
```

## refund_policy.md

```md
# Refund Policy

Refund window: 14 days suggested.

Refunds may be considered if:
- files are missing
- download is inaccessible
- product description materially misrepresented the contents

Refunds are not based on:
- lack of sales
- lack of KDP/Etsy ranking
- failure to follow the workflow
- marketplace rejection caused by buyer’s own assets, claims, or license violations

No income guarantee is provided.
```

---

# BUYER TEST

| Tiêu chí | Điểm /10 | Nhận xét |
|---|---:|---|
| Buyer Pain | 8 | Người mới bị kẹt giữa AI output và product packaging. |
| Workflow Value | 8 | Có 7-day map rõ. |
| Implementation Value | 8 | Có prompts, examples, checklist, fix prompts, listing kit. |
| AI Replace Risk | 5 | Đã giảm nhưng cần thêm sample Canva/PDF screenshots để mạnh hơn. |
| WarriorPlus Fit | 7 | FE $17 hợp beginner, affiliate angle rõ. |
| Asset Completeness | 7 | Có đủ core files text, chưa có mockup/video/ZIP thật. |
| Compliance Risk | 6 | Có note nhưng license nguồn vẫn UNKNOWN. |
| Final | 7.1 | Dùng được làm benchmark, chưa public launch. |

---

# AI REPLACE RISK AUDIT

## Overall Risk Level  
**Medium**

## High-Risk Sections  
Prompt Library, Listing Copy, Sales Page nếu chỉ copy text mà không có sample pages/mockups.

## Why Buyer May Skip Buying  
Họ nghĩ: “Tôi có thể hỏi ChatGPT tạo prompt printable.”

## What Must Be Added To Justify Purchase  
- 3–5 filled examples  
- Canva layout screenshots  
- ZIP-ready folder  
- prompt output test notes  
- walkthrough video 5–10 phút  
- license decision tree

## Files To Rewrite  
Không cần rewrite toàn bộ; cần bổ sung visual/sample vào `04_Example_Outputs.md`, `03_Template_Guide.md`, `delivery_page.md`.

## After Fix - Estimated Risk Level  
Low-Medium

## Rewrite Required  
**YES — nếu bán công khai.**

---

# REFUND RISK

| Risk | Level | Fix |
|---|---|---|
| Buyer kỳ vọng kiếm tiền | Medium | Nhấn mạnh no income guarantee. |
| Thiếu visual examples | Medium | Thêm previews/mockups. |
| License unclear | Medium-High | HUMAN REVIEW REQUIRED. |
| Prompt-only perception | Medium | Thêm workflow + checklist + examples đã có, nhưng cần sample files. |

---

# LICENSE / COMPLIANCE

**HUMAN REVIEW REQUIRED.**  
License của các source PLR/Canva/KDP assets trong brain là **UNKNOWN**. Gói này nên dùng như **original instructional benchmark**, không copy nguyên asset nguồn. Không tuyên bố PLR/MRR/RR nếu chưa có license explicit.

---

# PUBLIC LAUNCH AUDIT

| Gate | Status |
|---|---|
| Product assets drafted | Partial |
| Sales page drafted | Yes |
| WarriorPlus listing drafted | Yes |
| JV pack drafted | Yes |
| Delivery/support/refund drafted | Yes |
| ZIP exported/tested | No |
| Payment tested | No |
| Delivery tested | No |
| JV approval proof | No |
| Buyer proof | No |
| Compliance human review | No |

**Not Public Launch Ready without live payment/delivery/JV/buyer proof.**

---

# HONEST LIMITATIONS

- Chưa tạo file thật trên disk trong câu trả lời này.  
- Chưa export ZIP.  
- Chưa test payment/delivery.  
- Chưa có buyer/JV/sales proof.  
- License source assets vẫn UNKNOWN.  
- Chưa có visual mockups, Canva templates, hoặc PDF samples thật.  

---

# NEXT ACTION

1. Tạo folder: `/outputs/Printable_Prompt_to_Product_Sprint/product_assets/`  
2. Lưu 15 file markdown ở trên vào đúng tên file.  
3. Thêm 3 sample printable PDF mockups hoặc Canva screenshots.  
4. Chạy QC: placeholder, license, hype claims, missing files.  
5. Export ZIP test nội bộ.  
6. Sau đó mới chạy vòng 2: **Public Launch Audit + WarriorPlus listing hardening**.
